untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking of 'original point of the move', 'highest/lowest previously recorded price', and 'twice the starting price' as dynamic reference levels. These require multi-bar swing tracking and state management not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal logic requires identifying swing pivots and calculating retracement levels based on historical swing points, which cannot be expressed using only the provided static indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Props).
translation_notes: This is a Gann swing/retracement signal that requires custom swing-tracking logic. The core concept (price returning 100% to the starting point of a move) would need: (1) swing point identification across multiple bars, (2) dynamic reference level storage, and (3) retracement percentage calculation relative to those custom levels. Standard pivot points (pivot, r1, s1, r2, s2) are fixed levels, not adaptive swing retracements. A custom indicator calculating Gann retracements would be required.
